title: ultraworkers/claw-code
summary: 该项目是一个由AI代理完全自主管理和维护的博物馆展品，使用Rust语言和Gajae-Code / LazyCodex构建，没有任何人类干预。它展示了AI在软件开发和持续维护中的自主能力，具有极高的技术实验价值。
summary_en: This project is a museum exhibit fully managed and maintained by AI agents, built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex, with no human intervention. It demonstrates the autonomous capability of AI in software development and ongoing maintenance, offering significant experimental value.
